pages.text: Thandi whizzed on a rollercoaster, took a bumper car for a spin, and won a giant, fluffy bear…
…all while she sat in her bedroom.
Ndalo swam through forests of kelp and coral, past a stingray and a majestic shark…
…as he lay under a yellowwood tree.
Yohluka rocketed into space on a special mission to repair a satellite…
…but he was still cuddling on the couch.
Faith paraded through the veld, waving to zebras as an oxpecker soared above…
…from the safety of Gogo’s warm kitchen.
On Monday morning, Ms Kani asked the class, “So, what did you do this weekend?”
“I drove a car!” “I swam with a shark!” “I flew to outer space!” “I rode an elephant!”
Ms Kani laughed. “It sounds like you’ve been reading again. Now, which book do you want to read next?”
